ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size label */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Standard size label (e.g., XXS, XS, S, M, L) */,
  "top_size" TEXT /* Corresponding top size range */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Standard bust measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Standard waist measurement */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Standard hip measurement */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country or region for the size standard */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the size */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Standard shoulder width measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Standard sleeve length measurement */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Standard inseam measurement for bottom garments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment */,
  "garment_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment */,
  "garment_type" TEXT /* Type of the garment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size label of the garment */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the garment */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the garment */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material composition of the garment */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the garment */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the garment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Customer's bust measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Customer's waist measurement */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Customer's hip measurement */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* JSON string containing the purchase history of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the customer */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Customer's shoulder width measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Customer's sleeve length measurement */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Customer's inseam measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size label for the garment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the garment in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse, store) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who returned the garment */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the returned garment */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the returned garment */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the garment was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, processed, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., manager, inventory clerk) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the employee (e.g., 1 for basic, 2 for intermediate, 3 for advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the employee */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the system was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the system (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitting_room" (
  "fitting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitting room session */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who used the virtual fitting room */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment tried on */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the virtual fitting room session */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Customer feedback on the virtual fitting */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Type of device used for the virtual fitting (e.g., smartphone, tablet) */,
  "fitting_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the virtual fitting session in seconds */,
  "fitting_status" TEXT /* Status of the fitting session (e.g., completed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fitting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitting_room_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitting_room_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size preference record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Size label preferred by the customer */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the preference (0.0 - 1.0) */,
  "preferred_garment_type" TEXT /* Type of garment the preference is for */,
  "preference_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the size preference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
